title: Why does Amazon have no Western rivals?
summary: Amazon dominates online retail across both North America and Europe with no significant Western competitors capable of matching its scale. The company's market position dwarfs other e-commerce platforms on both sides of the Atlantic.
content: The internet giant dwarfs other online retailers on both sides of the Atlantic.

zh.title: 为什么亚马逊在西方没有竞争对手?
zh.summary: 亚马逊在北美和欧洲的在线零售市场占据主导地位，没有西方竞争对手能与其规模相匹敌。该公司的市场地位远超大西洋两岸的其他电子商务平台。

title: HS2 failings blamed on high-speed focus and political pressure
summary: A new review confirms that the UK's high-speed rail project HS2 was hampered by fundamental technical design flaws, shifting political priorities, and rapidly escalating costs. These "original sins" have contributed to the project's ongoing challenges.
content: A new reviews confirms the high-speed rail line's "original sins" include a technical design, changing political priorities and ballooning costs.

zh.title: HS2失败被归咎于高速重点和政治压力
zh.summary: 一份新的审查确认，英国高速铁路项目HS2受到了根本性技术设计缺陷、政治优先事项转变和成本迅速上升的阻碍。这些"原罪"已导致该项目持续存在的问题。

title: AI's insatiable appetite for electricity could revive a forsaken energy source
summary: The Trump administration is working to preserve coal as a viable energy source to meet AI infrastructure's growing electricity demands. As artificial intelligence systems consume more power, coal is being reconsidered as part of a robust grid strategy.
content: President Trump and Energy Secretary Chris Wright are working hard to keep coal alive as part of a robust grid.

zh.title: 人工智能对电力的贪婪胃口可能复兴被遗弃的能源
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在努力保持煤炭作为可行能源，以满足人工智能基础设施日益增长的电力需求。随着人工智能系统消耗更多电力，煤炭正被重新考虑作为强大电网战略的一部分。

title: Stock futures are little changed after record-setting week for Wall Street; traders await Nvidia and retail earnings: Live updates
summary: Stock index futures showed minimal movement following Wall Street's record-setting week. Investors are awaiting major earnings reports from Nvidia (Wednesday), Target (Wednesday), and Walmart (Thursday) to guide near-term market direction.
content: Nvidia is set to report earnings Wednesday along with Target, while Walmart is due to post results Thursday.

zh.title: 股市期货在华尔街创纪录周后小幅变动；交易员等待英伟达和零售业收益报告：实时更新
zh.summary: 在华尔街创纪录周后，股指期货走势基本持平。投资者正在等待英伟达（周三）、Target（周三）和沃尔玛（周四）的主要收益报告，以指导近期市场走向。

title: What former poker champion turned investing coach Annie Duke says most of us get wrong about risk
summary: Former poker champion and investing coach Annie Duke discusses why investors commonly make costly mistakes, including falling prey to market bubbles and freezing during critical trading moments. Her book "Quit" explores decision-making and risk management for investors.
content: The author of ‘Quit’ talks about market bubbles, costly investing mistakes and why investors freeze at the worst time.

zh.title: 前扑克冠军转身投资教练安妮·杜克说我们大多数人对风险的认识有何错误
zh.summary: 前扑克冠军兼投资教练安妮·杜克讨论了投资者为何经常犯代价高昂的错误，包括陷入市场泡沫和在关键交易时刻冻结。她的著作《Quit》探讨了投资者的决策制定和风险管理。

title: Your 3–6 months of emergency savings won’t cut it — why the job market now demands an 18-month cash cushion
summary: As AI threatens employment stability, financial experts recommend workers maintain 18 months of emergency savings rather than the traditional 3-6 months. The shift reflects concerns about job displacement and the need for greater financial resilience.
content: Artificial intelligence will displace some jobs and replace others. Here’s how to make sure you’re on the right side of change.

zh.title: 3-6个月的应急储蓄不够——为什么就业市场现在需要18个月的现金储备
zh.summary: 随着人工智能威胁就业稳定性，金融专家建议工作者维持18个月的应急储蓄，而不是传统的3-6个月。这一转变反映了对工作流离的担忧以及对更大财务复原力的需求。

title: With Long Island Rail Road shut down, NY governor begs unions to resume talks
summary: Gov. Hochul is calling for unions to restart contract negotiations after the Long Island Rail Road shutdown. The labor dispute disrupts regional transportation for thousands of commuters.
content: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul pleaded with unions representing workers for the Long Island Rail Road to resume bargaining Sunday.

zh.title: 长岛铁路关闭，纽约州长恳求工会恢复谈判
zh.summary: 霍楚州长呼吁工会在长岛铁路关闭后重新启动合同谈判。劳资纠纷中断了数千名通勤者的区域交通。

title: Trump warns Iran to 'get moving' or 'there won’t be anything left'
summary: President Trump has issued threatening statements toward Iran, with warnings about targeting civilian infrastructure. These statements raise international law and escalation concerns.
content: The president has previously threatened to strike civilian infrastructure in Iran, a potential war crime.

zh.title: 特朗普警告伊朗"要么行动，要么将一无所有"
zh.summary: 特朗普总统对伊朗发出威胁性声明，警告可能针对民用基础设施。这些声明引起了国际法和升级的担忧。

title: Health officials declare Ebola outbreak a public health emergency
summary: A rare Ebola strain has caused approximately 80 deaths in Congo and Uganda, prompting the WHO to declare a public health emergency. The outbreak underscores ongoing infectious disease threats in the region.
content: A rare strain of Ebola virus likely caused 80 deaths in Congo and Uganda, prompting the World Health Organization to declare a public health emergency.

zh.title: 卫生官员宣布埃博拉疫情为公共卫生紧急事件
zh.summary: 罕见的埃博拉病毒株在刚果和乌干达造成约80人死亡，促使世界卫生组织宣布公共卫生紧急事件。疫情凸显了该地区持续存在的传染病威胁。

title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market for the week ahead
summary: Key market catalysts for the week include Nvidia's earnings report and Google's developer conference, expected to keep AI sector momentum in focus. These events will likely influence broader tech stock performance.
content: Nvidia's earnings report and Google's developer conference will keep the AI boom front and center.

zh.title: 本周股市需要关注的3大关键事项
zh.summary: 本周的主要市场催化剂包括英伟达的财报和谷歌的开发者大会，预计将维持人工智能领域的发展势头。这些事件可能会影响更广泛的科技股表现。

title: Walmart and Target are about to show just how much shopping habits have changed due to the Iran war
summary: Retail earnings reports from Walmart and Target will reveal consumer spending patterns affected by geopolitical tensions and energy costs. Rising gas prices above $4.50-$5 per gallon typically trigger reduced consumer spending.
content: Walmart has said that customers start to cut spending when gas prices hit $4.50 to $5 a gallon.

zh.title: 沃尔玛和塔吉特即将揭示伊朗战争如何改变购物习惯
zh.summary: 沃尔玛和塔吉特的零售收益报告将揭示受地缘政治紧张局势和能源成本影响的消费者支出模式。汽油价格上升至每加仑4.50-5美元通常会触发消费支出的下降。

title: Swatch stores close for second day after crowds
summary: Swatch closed its retail stores for a second consecutive day due to overwhelming customer demand surrounding the launch of a new £335 pocket watch. The product release has generated unexpectedly large crowds at physical locations.
content: The launch of a new £335 pocket watch has drawn criticism after queues of shoppers built up again.

zh.title: 斯沃琪商店因人群拥挤第二天关闭
zh.summary: 由于新推出的335英镑怀表的客户需求过大，斯沃琪关闭了其零售店铺连续第二天。该产品发布在实体店铺产生了出人意料的大量顾客。

title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
summary: HALO stocks—companies and sectors resistant to AI displacement—have emerged as a prominent investment theme on Wall Street. A new ETF has launched to give investors structured exposure to this thematic investment category.
content: The search for HALO stocks is a hot theme in the stock market. There is now an ETF to invest in it.

zh.title: 市场最热的股票主题：投资无法被AI取代的一切
zh.summary: HALO股票（即能够抵抗AI替代的公司和部门）已成为华尔街的一个突出投资主题。一只新推出的ETF为投资者提供了参与该主题投资的结构化方式。

title: Nvidia is getting some help as it props up S&P 500 earnings growth
summary: Nvidia remains the largest earnings contributor to the S&P 500, with Micron emerging as the second-largest contributor. However, Nvidia's outsized impact on index earnings growth is expected to diminish.
content: Micron is expected to be the second-largest contributor to the index’s overall earnings growth — behind Nvidia, whose impact will likely diminish.

zh.title: 英伟达在支撑标普500指数收益增长方面获得帮助
zh.summary: 英伟达仍然是标普500指数的最大收益贡献者，而美光正成为第二大贡献者。不过，英伟达对指数收益增长的过度影响预计将有所减弱。

title: AI-related layoffs a boost for stocks? Not necessarily
summary: Recent analysis suggests AI-related corporate layoffs may not provide the stock market boost some investors expect. The data reveals complexities in how workforce reductions impact overall market performance.
content: The data underscores an uncomfortable reality.

zh.title: AI相关裁员是股市的利好?未必
zh.summary: 最近的分析表明，与AI相关的企业裁员可能不会像某些投资者预期的那样提振股市。数据揭示了员工削减对整体市场表现的复杂影响。

title: Why your 'fixed' mortgage payment keeps going up
summary: Despite fixed mortgage rates, homeowners are experiencing rising monthly payments due to increased property taxes and insurance costs. This squeeze affects millions of American homeowners' housing affordability.
content: Rising property taxes and surging homeowners insurance costs are pushing up the amount that homeowners must pay monthly alongside their mortgage.

zh.title: 为什么你的固定房贷付款一直在增加
zh.summary: 尽管抵押贷款利率固定，但由于财产税和保险成本增加，房主的月供在上升。这种压力影响了数百万美国房主的住房购买力。

title: Americans are leaving the U.S. in record numbers and spending hundreds to learn how to do it
summary: Record numbers of Americans are seeking to relocate abroad, with events like Expatsi's "Move Abroad Con" drawing hundreds interested in relocation. This trend reflects shifting attitudes toward living overseas.
content: Expatsi's "Move Abroad Con" attracted hundreds of Americans hoping to move overseas.

zh.title: 美国人正以创纪录的数字离开美国，花费数百美元学习如何移居海外
zh.summary: 创纪录数量的美国人正寻求迁往国外，像Expatsi的"移居海外大会"这样的活动吸引了数百位有意迁居的人。这种趋势反映了对在海外生活态度的转变。

title: ‘Several days have passed’: The restaurant failed to process my 20% tip. Is it cheating the staff?
summary: A consumer reports delayed tip processing at a restaurant, raising questions about wage theft and gratuity handling. The issue highlights gaps in how dining establishments process credit card tips.
content: “When I use a credit card, tips are usually added immediately.”

zh.title: "几天过去了"：餐厅未能处理我的20%小费。这是在欺骗员工吗？
zh.summary: 消费者报告餐厅小费处理延迟，引发了关于工资盗窃和小费处理的问题。这个问题突出了餐饮企业处理信用卡小费的差距。

title: These hidden forces are driving the runaway stock-market rally
summary: Options traders and leveraged ETF buying are fueling the recent dramatic stock market rally, though these forces face scrutiny. The concentration of these drivers raises questions about market sustainability.
content: Bullish options traders and heavy buying of leveraged ETFs are playing a role in the historic swing higher for stocks. They’re also being tested.

zh.title: 这些隐藏的力量正在推动失控的股市反弹
zh.summary: 期权交易员和杠杆ETF购买正在推动最近的戏剧性股市反弹，尽管这些力量面临审查。这些驱动力的集中引发了关于市场可持续性的问题。

title: G7 finance ministers to meet amid warning of economic consequences of prolonged Strait of Hormuz closure
summary: G7 finance ministers are gathering in Paris as global borrowing costs rise, with concerns about the economic fallout from potential extended disruptions to the critical Strait of Hormuz shipping route. This meeting signals heightened concern about geopolitical risks threatening international trade and financial stability.
content: G7 finance ministers are due to meet in Paris on Monday and Tuesday as long-term borrowing costs surge.

zh.title: G7财政部长在霍尔木兹海峡长期关闭经济后果警告中会面
zh.summary: G7财政部长在巴黎集聚，全球借贷成本上升，对关键的霍尔木兹海峡航运路线可能长期中断造成的经济影响表示担忧。这次会议表明对威胁国际贸易和金融稳定的地缘政治风险的关注加剧。

title: My wife and I retired with 22 times our income. Why don’t more people do what we did?
summary: A couple achieved early retirement by accumulating 22 times their annual income, highlighting a financial strategy many people avoid due to psychological barriers around money management. The piece explores why financial intimidation prevents broader adoption of this savings-focused approach.
content: “The vast majority of people I’ve known are intimidated by money’s power, imbue it with almost magical qualities.”

zh.title: 我和妻子用22倍年收入实现退休，为什么更多人不这样做？
zh.summary: 一对夫妇通过积累22倍年收入实现了提前退休，突显出许多人因金钱管理的心理障碍而避免采纳的财务策略。该文章探讨了为什么金融恐惧感阻止了这种以储蓄为重点的方法的广泛采纳。

title: Abu Dhabi says drone strike caused fire at nuclear power plant, no injuries or safety impacted
summary: A drone strike hit an electrical generator outside a nuclear facility in Abu Dhabi, causing a fire but no injuries or radiological impact according to authorities. The incident underscores growing security concerns around critical infrastructure in the Middle East.
content: The drone struck an electrical generator outside the inner perimeter of the plant, but radiological levels were unaffected, Abu Dhabi's media office says.

zh.title: 阿布扎比称无人机袭击导致核电站火灾，无人员伤亡或安全影响
zh.summary: 无人机袭击了阿布扎比一个核设施外的发电机，引发火灾，但根据当局称无人员伤亡或放射性影响。该事件凸显了中东关键基础设施面临的日益增长的安全隐患。

title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
summary: Wall Street analysts are recommending three stocks based on strong earnings performance and robust demand for AI infrastructure. Favorable spending trends have boosted analyst confidence in these long-term holdings.
content: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

zh.title: 顶级华尔街分析师建议这3只股票用于其长期前景
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师基于强劲的盈利表现和对人工智能基础设施的强劲需求推荐了三只股票。有利的支出趋势提高了分析师对这些长期持股的信心。

title: Ross Stores and TJX Companies among stocks with earnings momentum reporting this week
summary: Retail stocks Ross Stores and TJX Companies are set to report earnings this week with positive momentum indicators suggesting strong performance ahead. Both companies represent key bellwethers for the retail sector's health.
content: Ross Stores and TJX Companies are two stocks reporting this week with earnings momentum at their backs.

zh.title: 罗斯百货和TJX公司等零售股本周报告业绩，动能指标向好
zh.summary: 罗斯百货和TJX公司零售股本周将报告业绩，积极的动能指标表明未来表现强劲。这两家公司是零售业整体健康状况的重要指标。

title: These ‘underappreciated winners of AI’ also pay solid income
summary: Real estate investment trusts are positioned as overlooked beneficiaries of artificial intelligence adoption while offering investors reliable dividend income. Wall Street analysts see substantial upside potential in these AI-exposed properties.
content: These real estate investment trusts offer exposure to artificial intelligence. Wall Street sees upside ahead.

zh.title: 这些"被低估的人工智能赢家"也提供稳定的收入
zh.summary: 房地产投资信托基金被定位为人工智能采用的被忽视的受益者，同时向投资者提供可靠的股息收入。华尔街分析师看到这些受人工智能影响的房产具有巨大的上升潜力。

title: 'Vicious circle of rising costs is fuelling crisis for traders'
summary: Supply chain disruptions and inflation are creating a cost crisis for small traders, with commodity prices like dried apricots tripling in a year from £35 to £100 per box. The escalating expenses threaten the viability of small businesses dependent on imported goods.
content: "Dried apricots 12 months ago were £35 for a 12kg box, now they're £100 a box," says cheesemonger.

zh.title: "成本上升的恶性循环正在加剧交易商危机"
zh.summary: 供应链中断和通胀正在为小型交易商造成成本危机，商品价格如干杏在一年内从35英镑涨至100英镑每盒。不断上升的费用威胁到依赖进口商品的小企业的生存能力。

title: 'We need working-class voices to enrich culture'
summary: Journalist Kate Pasola advocates for breaking down socioeconomic barriers to ensure working-class perspectives shape cultural discourse. The commentary highlights how excluding working-class voices limits cultural diversity and inclusivity.
content: Northumberland journalist Kate Pasola says there is a need to break down socioeconomic barriers.

zh.title: 我们需要工薪阶层的声音来丰富文化
zh.summary: 记者凯特·帕索拉主张打破社会经济障碍，确保工薪阶层的观点塑造文化话语。评论强调了排除工薪阶层声音如何限制文化多样性和包容性。

title: How can the PM improve the lives of  Londoners?
summary: The BBC Politics London program examines policy recommendations from three organizations on how the Prime Minister could enhance quality of life for London residents. The analysis covers actionable proposals across key policy areas affecting Londoners.
content: The BBC Politics London show asks three bodies which policies could improve Londoners' lives.

zh.title: 英国首相如何改善伦敦人的生活？
zh.summary: BBC政治伦敦节目考查了三个组织关于英国首相如何改善伦敦居民生活质量的政策建议。该分析涵盖了影响伦敦人的关键政策领域的可行性建议。
